category.scope_note: Radio and telecommunications terminal equipment exported from China to Solomon Islands (TCSI jurisdiction). Covers type approval, EMC/spectrum, electrical safety, local importer requirements, and cybersecurity obligations.

title.en: Exporting Wireless Devices from China to Solomon Islands — TCSI Compliance Guide
title.zh: 中国无线设备出口所罗门群岛——TCSI合规指南
title.zht: 中國無線設備出口所羅門群島——TCSI合規指引

description.en: Regulatory requirements for wireless and telecommunications terminal equipment exported from China to Solomon Islands, governed by the Telecommunications Commission of Solomon Islands (TCSI). Covers type approval, spectrum standards, electrical safety (240 V / 50 Hz / Type I), local importer obligations, and the Computer Crimes Act 2016.
description.zh: 中国无线及电信终端设备出口所罗门群岛的监管要求，由所罗门群岛电信委员会（TCSI）主管。涵盖型式认证、频谱标准、电气安全（240V / 50Hz / I型插头）、当地进口商义务及《2016年计算机犯罪法》。
description.zht: 中國無線及電信終端設備出口所羅門群島的監管要求，由所羅門群島電信委員會（TCSI）主管。涵蓋型式認證、頻譜標準、電氣安全（240V / 50Hz / I型插頭）、當地進口商義務及《2016年電腦罪行法》。

disclaimer.en: This dataset is compiled from publicly available sources for general informational purposes only. It does not constitute legal or regulatory advice. Regulatory requirements change frequently; always verify with TCSI and qualified local counsel before market entry. Verified status is false for all entries.
disclaimer.zh: 本数据集仅根据公开资料汇编，仅供一般参考，不构成法律或监管建议。法规要求可能随时变动，进入市场前请务必向TCSI及当地专业律师核实。所有条目均未经核实。
disclaimer.zht: 本資料集僅根據公開資料彙編，僅供一般參考，不構成法律或監管建議。法規要求可能隨時變動，進入市場前請務必向TCSI及當地專業律師核實。所有條目均未經核實。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices exported from China to Solomon Islands require mandatory TCSI type approval — CE, FCC, and CCC marks are NOT recognized. A local Solomon Islands importer or authorized agent is required. Electrical compliance must meet 240 V / 50 Hz / Type I (Australian 3-pin) standards. AS/NZS-accredited lab test reports may support the TCSI application.
answer_first.zh: 从中国出口至所罗门群岛的无线设备须强制取得TCSI型式认证——CE、FCC及CCC标志不被认可。需指定当地所罗门群岛进口商或授权代理。电气合规须符合240V / 50Hz / I型插头（澳式三脚）标准。AS/NZS认可实验室出具的测试报告可用于支持TCSI申请。
answer_first.zht: 從中國出口至所羅門群島的無線設備須強制取得TCSI型式認證——CE、FCC及CCC標誌不獲認可。需指定當地所羅門群島進口商或授權代理。電氣合規須符合240V / 50Hz / I型插頭（澳式三腳）標準。AS/NZS認可實驗室出具的測試報告可用於支持TCSI申請。

editorial_controls.change_policy: All regulatory changes must be verified against TCSI official publications before updating rows.
